# East Central Health District

> Public health services, immunizations, WIC, environmental health, and a Mobile Health Clinic across 13 counties in East Central Georgia. Part of the Georgia Department of Public Health.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of East Central Health District services.
- [About](/about): Mission, leadership, and the 13-county service area.
- [Counties](/counties): County health department locations and contacts.
- [Programs](/programs): Public health programs offered across the district.
- [Services](/services): Clinical and community health services.
- [Environmental Health](/environmental-health): Inspections, permits, and environmental programs.
- [Women's Health](/womens-health): Women's health services and clinics.
- [WIC](/wic): Women, Infants, and Children nutrition program.
- [News](/news): District news and announcements.
- [Calendar](/calendar): Upcoming events and clinics.
- [Directory](/directory): Staff and office directory.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the district.
- [Mobile Health Clinic (WeGo)](/wego): The Mobile Health Clinic that brings services to neighborhoods.
- [WeGo Schedule](/wego/schedule): Where the mobile clinic will be next.
- [WeGo Services](/wego/services): Services offered onboard the mobile clinic.
- [Accessibility](/accessibility): Accessibility statement.

## Optional

- [WeGo About](/wego/about)
- [WeGo FAQ](/wego/faq)
- [WeGo Contact](/wego/contact)
